name: Neo-Grünfeld Defense: with g3 as Black
description: A Black repertoire for the Neo-Grünfeld Defense: with g3, drilled one position at a time: every card is a position with exactly one book move to find. Built from 3,000,000 rated games (Lichess database 2026-06, ratings 1600-2200): opponent replies branch by how often they are actually played, covering the most common 90% at each turn, so frequent lines run deep and rare sidelines stay shallow. 3 positions.

fields.prompt: You are Black in the Neo-Grünfeld Defense: with g3. What is the book move?
fields.extra: 1. d4 **Nf6** [White plays d4 here 27% of the time]

fields.prompt: You are Black in the Neo-Grünfeld Defense: with g3. What is the book move?
fields.extra: 1. d4 Nf6 2. c4 **g6** [White plays c4 here 43% of the time]

fields.prompt: You are Black in the Neo-Grünfeld Defense: with g3. What is the book move?
fields.extra: 1. d4 Nf6 2. c4 g6 3. g3 **d5** (with g3, D70) [White plays g3 here 2% of the time]
